overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking through a rural mountainous region at night. The character travels from a lakeside dirt path through rocky terrain to a paved road near abandoned wooden cabins, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the lake with snow-capped mountains ahead

entered.detail: large mountain peak with snow visible on top against the dark sky
dark water body running parallel to the path on the right
steep rocky terrain rising on the left side of the path
unpaved dirt path with tire tracks and sparse grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide-open lakeside trail at night, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the distance. The dirt path runs between a rocky cliff on the left and the dark lake water on the right, under an overcast night sky.

events.description: path curves inland away from the lake into rockier terrain with denser tree cover

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding dirt path through rocky outcrops and trees

entered.detail: massive boulder and rock outcrop on the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail curves away from the water into a more enclosed rocky area with pine trees. The snow-capped mountain remains visible ahead but closer now, as the character walks through the winding dirt path between large rock formations.

events.description: dirt trail transitions to paved asphalt road as abandoned wooden cabins come into view
character walks past the abandoned white pickup truck parked beside the log cabin

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement and walking past the abandoned vehicle on the left

notable_agents.action: abandoned white pickup truck parked beside the wooden cabin

entered.detail: asphalt road surface replacing the dirt trail
weathered wooden cabin with dark windows beside the road
flickering orange fire glow visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The dirt path gives way to a paved road as the character enters an abandoned settlement. A white pickup truck sits parked beside a weathered log cabin on the left, while a distant campfire glows ahead. The character walks past the vehicle and continues down the asphalt road.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the paved road toward the distant campfire and buildings

entered.detail: two-story white house with gabled roof visible at the end of the road

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the paved road through the rural settlement, passing the abandoned cabin and truck behind. The campfire glow grows closer ahead, with a white house now visible in the distance at the road's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a desolate lakeside trail into the heart of an abandoned rural settlement under an overcast night sky. It begins with the character walking along a wide dirt path flanked by a rocky cliff and dark lake water, with a snow-capped mountain looming in the distance. As the trail curves away from the shoreline, the environment shifts into a more enclosed rocky area where the path winds between large stone formations and pine trees. The terrain then transitions from dirt to a paved road as the character enters a settlement, passing a weathered log cabin and a parked white pickup truck. Finally, the camera follows the character further down the asphalt road, moving past the abandoned structures toward the warm glow of a distant campfire and a white house at the road's end.
